title: GTA CRAFT
description: This modpack recreate gta V in the best way possible by adding a lot of stuff.
body:
# Buy me a coffe
## [here☕❤️](https://buymeacoffee.com/minhero)
# Official Website
## [GTA CRAFT WEBSITE](https://gta-craft.vercel.app/)
# Overview

This modpack recreates GTA V inside Minecraft as accurately and deeply as possible. It features realistic weapons, fully functional vehicles, a GTA-style interface, advanced animations, and a complete city map already included. Designed for immersion and flexibility.

---

# Features

Custom GTA-style main menu using FancyMenu

Realistic firearms with sound effects, recoil, and animations

Driveable cars, planes, tanks, ect...

Third-person GTA-like camera and freecam system

In-game voice chat fully supported

Integrated minimap and GPS (via JourneyMap)


GTA V city map included in the modpack

Enhanced graphics with shader support

Shaders are enabled by default.

Can be disabled manually if your system is not powerful enough.




---

# Installation

## GTA 5 Map

The map is included with the modpack.
If it is missing or fails to load, you can download it manually [Here](https://mega.nz/file/ZFgEXL4A#KqcMlmjynlqWUwtdoewXDojejau39qKItB8R7j7SQAk)

The key for the mega file is :"KqcMlmjynlqWUwtdoewXDojejau39qKItB8R7j7SQAk"

Download GTA 5 Map
Place it in your saves/ folder and rename the world to exactly: GTA 5

## Optional: GTA V Menu Music

To activate the original GTA V menu music, download the custom resource pack [Here](https://mega.nz/file/UBxGWYDb#JrY5fvcG6f0uBx93URNVE1nxYs7myqVWTCWlrR50lwM)

The key dor the mega file:"JrY5fvcG6f0uBx93URNVE1nxYs7myqVWTCWlrR50lwM"

Download GTA V Music Resource Pack
Place it in your resourcepacks/ folder and enable it from the Minecraft options.


---

# Warnings and Requirements

Heavy modpack: Allocate at least 6 to 8 GB of RAM

Shaders are optional and on by default.

Requires Forge 1.16.5


---

## Mod Highlights

(Full mod list available in the modpack files)

FancyMenu (UI and main menu customization)

Immersive Vehicles + UNU Packs

JourneyMap (GPS and minimap)

Voice Chat Integration

Player Animation Library, Emotecraft

Oculus + Embeddium (graphics performance)

BetterThirdPerson, Freecam

Clumps, Controlling, JEI, 

and so much more
